text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* There have been no changes to the
seven-centimeter gap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Data collection and physical conditioning for the
Hopeful Stakes and my predicted classic year
wins, the Satsuki Sho and Kikuka Sho, is going
smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Derby for all three crowns is
impossible at this stage, though. Trainer has
presented some data on the issue.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Trainer collected data on unquantifiable
influences to try to shrink the seven-centimeter
gap, even if only by 0.01 centimeters at a time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: ...I acknowledge the need for further research. */
